content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Overview

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: video hero CTA system, transparent overlay navbar, glass navigation, mobile fullscreen menu, campaign SVG CTA, SaaS dual CTA, glass CTA
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

Visual traits:
- CTA style matches hero composition
- custom SVG-shaped CTA for campaign heroes
- dual CTA for SaaS/app video heroes
- strong glass CTA for Liquid Glass video heroes
- transparent overlay navbar
- glass navbar for busy video backgrounds
- functional mobile full-screen menu
- tagline pill above SaaS headline

Use when:
- video hero CTA system
- transparent overlay navbar
- glass navigation
- mobile fullscreen menu
- campaign SVG CTA
- SaaS dual CTA
- glass CTA

Avoid when:
- desktop navigation squeezed into mobile
- too many CTA variants
- bouncy CTA motion
- navbar competing with hero headline
- low-contrast nav on video
- CTA readability lost over video

AI summary: Premium video hero CTA and navigation system: custom SVG-shaped CTA for campaign heroes, dual CTA for SaaS/app video heroes, strong glass CTA for Liquid Glass heroes, transparent overlay nav for full-screen video, glass nav for busy backgrounds, tagline pill, and functional mobile full-screen menu.

source_name: User curated premium video hero skill set
content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Layout Rules

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: video hero CTA system, transparent overlay navbar, glass navigation, mobile fullscreen menu, campaign SVG CTA, SaaS dual CTA, glass CTA
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- Custom SVG-shaped CTA uses SVG filling the button container and text centered above it.
- Campaign CTA can use fixed size around 184px by 65px.
- Dual CTA uses a brand-color primary action and dark neutral or deep brand secondary action.
- Both dual CTA buttons should share height and radius.
- Glass CTA uses strong glass and may include an icon in a circular container.
- Transparent overlay navbar is full-width, z-20 or higher, with logo left, links center or center-left, and actions right.
- Desktop navbar padding can be wide, such as px-[120px], when composition needs cinematic spacing.
- Mobile hides desktop links/buttons and opens a full-screen dark overlay menu.

AI summary: Premium video hero CTA and navigation system: custom SVG-shaped CTA for campaign heroes, dual CTA for SaaS/app video heroes, strong glass CTA for Liquid Glass heroes, transparent overlay nav for full-screen video, glass nav for busy backgrounds, tagline pill, and functional mobile full-screen menu.

content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Interaction States

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: video hero CTA system, transparent overlay navbar, glass navigation, mobile fullscreen menu, campaign SVG CTA, SaaS dual CTA, glass CTA
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- Custom SVG CTA hover uses scale-105; active uses scale-95.
- Glass CTA hover uses scale-105; active uses scale-95.
- Dual CTA hover slightly lightens backgrounds.
- Avoid large bouncy CTA interactions.
- Mobile menu must open and close predictably.
- Navbar must remain above video and overlays.
- Glass navigation must preserve contrast as video brightness changes.

AI summary: Premium video hero CTA and navigation system: custom SVG-shaped CTA for campaign heroes, dual CTA for SaaS/app video heroes, strong glass CTA for Liquid Glass heroes, transparent overlay nav for full-screen video, glass nav for busy backgrounds, tagline pill, and functional mobile full-screen menu.

content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Accessibility Notes

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: video hero CTA system, transparent overlay navbar, glass navigation, mobile fullscreen menu, campaign SVG CTA, SaaS dual CTA, glass CTA
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- CTA text must remain readable over custom SVG shapes.
- Mobile menu requires keyboard focus management and a close path.
- Hamburger requires accessible label.
- Do not rely on color alone to distinguish primary and secondary CTA.
- Navigation links must remain readable over video.
- Do not hide key action buttons on mobile without an accessible alternative.

AI summary: Premium video hero CTA and navigation system: custom SVG-shaped CTA for campaign heroes, dual CTA for SaaS/app video heroes, strong glass CTA for Liquid Glass heroes, transparent overlay nav for full-screen video, glass nav for busy backgrounds, tagline pill, and functional mobile full-screen menu.

source_name: User curated premium video hero skill set
content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Implementation Hints

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: video hero CTA system, transparent overlay navbar, glass navigation, mobile fullscreen menu, campaign SVG CTA, SaaS dual CTA, glass CTA
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- Tagline pill can be around 38px height with radius around 10px and an inner solid badge such as New.
- Transparent overlay navbar suits full-screen video hero, SaaS app first screen, and product launch page.
- Glass navigation suits busy backgrounds, changing video brightness, and floating control feel.
- Custom SVG CTA suits campaign or distinctive brand heroes.
- Use only one CTA system per hero family; do not mix custom SVG CTA, dual CTA, and glass CTA without hierarchy.

AI summary: Premium video hero CTA and navigation system: custom SVG-shaped CTA for campaign heroes, dual CTA for SaaS/app video heroes, strong glass CTA for Liquid Glass heroes, transparent overlay nav for full-screen video, glass nav for busy backgrounds, tagline pill, and functional mobile full-screen menu.
